abstract_summary: A reproducible Python framework for comparing how different AI research agents interpret the same omics dataset across three modalities: transcriptomics, proteomics, and metabolomics. Each modality is a self-contained project with the same core pipeline and modality-specific domain scoring. The framework evaluates a...
